output:
Based on your requirements and preferences, here is a 7-day meal plan for you:

Day 1:
Breakfast: Scrambled Eggs with Spinach & Tomato
Lunch: Chicken & Potato Indian Curry
Dinner: Thai Grilled Beef Salad

Day 2:
Breakfast: Overnight Gluten-Free Oats
Lunch: Mexican Chicken Lettuce Wraps
Dinner: Baked Potato with Chili (using gluten-free ingredients)

Day 3:
Breakfast: Greek Yogurt Parfait with Berries (using lactose-free yogurt)
Lunch: Beef Tacos with Corn Tortillas (using gluten-free tortillas)
Dinner: Chicken Tikka Masala with Rice

Day 4:
Breakfast: Avocado Toast on Gluten-Free Bread
Lunch: Thai Coconut Curry Soup with Chicken
Dinner: Baked Salmon with Roasted Potatoes

Day 5:
Breakfast: Smoothie Bowl with Mixed Berries and Almond Milk
Lunch: Beef Stir-Fry with Vegetables and Rice
Dinner: Quinoa Stuffed Bell Peppers

Day 6:
Breakfast: Breakfast Burrito with Eggs, Potatoes, and Salsa (using gluten-free tortillas)
Lunch: Thai Basil Beef Stir-Fry
Dinner: Indian Lentil Soup (Dal) with Naan (using gluten-free naan)

Day 7:
Breakfast: Chia Seed Pudding with Almond Milk and Mango
Lunch: Mexican Quinoa Salad with Black Beans and Avocado
Dinner: Grilled Chicken with Sweet Potato Fries

Feel free to adjust portion sizes and ingredients based on your appetite and preferences. Enjoy your meals!
